## 🚀 Aria {{VERSION}}

### ✨ New Features
- Added karaoke mode with auto-hide controls and cursor on inactivity
- Added update checker that notifies when a new version is available
- <!-- list new features here -->

### 🐛 Bug Fixes
- Fixed queue panel overlapping with header on scroll
- Fixed sidebar not auto-closing on narrow window resize
- <!-- list bug fixes here -->

### 🔧 Improvements
- Replaced keep listening carousel with compact grid + remaining indicator
- Extracted karaoke fullscreen management into reusable hook
- <!-- list improvements and tweaks here -->

### Downloads
| Platform | Architecture | Asset |
|---|---|---|
| 🍎 macOS (Apple Silicon) | `aarch64` | `Aria-{{VERSION}}-aarch64-apple-darwin.dmg` |
| 🍎 macOS (Intel) | `x86_64` | `Aria-{{VERSION}}-x86_64-apple-darwin.dmg` |
| 🪟 Windows | `x86_64` | `Aria-{{VERSION}}-x86_64-pc-windows-msvc.msi` |
| 🐧 Linux | `x86_64` | `Aria-{{VERSION}}-x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu.deb` |

### Install
1. Download the appropriate asset for your platform.
2. Open/run the installer.
3. Launch Aria from your applications menu.
